# Nuzenio

> Nuzenio is a professional multi-language news platform for live RSS headlines, local news, world news, video news, live news channels, source attribution, and AI-powered context.

## Core URLs

- Home: https://nuzenio.com/
- Top News: https://nuzenio.com/top-news
- Local News: https://nuzenio.com/local
- World News: https://nuzenio.com/world
- Business News: https://nuzenio.com/business
- Technology News: https://nuzenio.com/technology
- AI News: https://nuzenio.com/ai
- Live News: https://nuzenio.com/live
- Video News: https://nuzenio.com/video

## Feeds And Discovery

- Sitemap: https://nuzenio.com/sitemap.xml
- Sitemap Index: https://nuzenio.com/sitemap-index.xml
- Language Sitemap: https://nuzenio.com/sitemap-languages.xml
- News Sitemap: https://nuzenio.com/news-sitemap.xml
- RSS Feed: https://nuzenio.com/feed.xml
- OpenSearch: https://nuzenio.com/opensearch.xml

## Trust And Policy Pages

- About: https://nuzenio.com/about.html
- Sources: https://nuzenio.com/sources.html
- Editorial Policy: https://nuzenio.com/editorial-policy.html
- AI Policy: https://nuzenio.com/ai-policy.html
- Corrections: https://nuzenio.com/corrections.html
- Privacy: https://nuzenio.com/privacy.html
- Terms: https://nuzenio.com/terms.html
- Affiliate Disclosure: https://nuzenio.com/affiliate-disclosure.html
- Security Contact: https://nuzenio.com/.well-known/security.txt

## Content Notes

Nuzenio displays publisher-attributed RSS headlines and approved playable news sources. AI summaries and context panels are reading aids and should be treated separately from original publisher reporting. Original source links remain visible for article verification.

## Contact

- Email: syleriofficial@gmail.com
